## Release Promotion

- source branch: `main` (integration); use a short-lived topic branch if needed
- target branch: `main` (merge) or release tag target as applicable
- release tag:
- binder or release note:

## Promotion Checks

- [ ] validation passed on `main` (or topic branch before merge)
- [ ] family policy checks passed
- [ ] release notes reviewed
- [ ] cross-repo dependency order confirmed
